title: FamousFacePlanche
description: One planche for the Famous Face task. The patient sees a single face and states whether they recognise it. All stimuli in this task are famous persons (is_familiar=true). The person's name is visible only to the clinician.

stimulus_id.description: Unique planche identifier. Format: FF_NNN (e.g. FF_001).

is_familiar.description: Always true for Famous Face stimuli. Drives automatic correctness scoring.

face_image.description: Path to the face image, relative to stimuli/images/. Must show the face clearly without text overlays.

person_name.description: Full name of the person. SHOWN TO CLINICIAN ONLY, never to the patient.

person_category.description: Domain in which the person is famous. Used for category-coverage counterbalancing.

nationality.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. 'FR', 'US'). Used to match stimuli to patient population.

fame_era.description: Decade(s) of peak fame, e.g. '1990s', '2000s-present'. Helps match stimuli to patient's cultural memory window.

clinician_notes.description: Private notes for the clinician (context, caveats, image source).
